sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20702" key="bou/tragos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βού-τρᾰγος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20702.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ox-goat</tr_>, fabulousanimal, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philostr.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">V A</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
